address_validation_btc: EVM address in BTC field returns error
address_validation_evm: BTC address in ETH field returns error
state_machine: Idle to Building to Confirming for BTC
Idle to Building to Confirming for EVM
Building to Error on fee estimation failure
Confirming to Submitting to Success for BTC
Submitting to Error on broadcast failure for BTC
Confirming to Submitting to Success for EVM
ui_state: fee tier selection updates selected index
error state can be reset to idle
edge_cases: prepareSend with invalid address sets error
prepareSend with invalid amount sets error
EVM gas estimation failure transitions to Error
EVM broadcast failure transitions to Error
amount plus fee exceeding balance handled gracefully

findings.description: Good test/code ratio: 42 tests for ~570 lines of implementation. All validation branches and state machine transitions are covered.
Tests use realistic data (actual BTC/ETH addresses, proper amounts), not trivial values.
Mock count is appropriate: BtcManager, EvmManager, SecureStorage, EvmSendHelper (4 mocks). Interface abstractions (EvmSendHelper, AddressChecksumProvider) enable clean unit testing.

Litmus test passed: removing validateAddress() regex check would cause 'valid P2PKH address passes' to return Invalid. Removing amount > balance check would cause 'exceeds balance' test to return Valid. Tests verify actual computation, not mocks.

verdict: Comprehensive test coverage. All TDD anchors from task 9 spec are covered. Tests are meaningful and follow established patterns from WalletViewModelTest.
